nasb.text: Then Jacob took fresh rods of poplar and almond and plane trees, and peeled white stripes in them, exposing the white which was in the rods.

esv.text: Then Jacob took fresh sticks of poplar and almond and plane trees, and peeled white streaks in them, exposing the white of the sticks.

cnv.text: 雅各拿楊樹、杏樹和楓樹的嫩枝子，把樹皮剝成白色的條紋，使枝子露出白的部分來。

ccb.text: 雅各折下一些杨树、杏树和枫树的嫩枝，削掉部分树皮，露出白色的条纹，

csbs.text: 雅各拿杨树、杏树和枫树的嫩枝，剥出白色条纹，使枝子露出白色部分。
